meaning: adj.未调整的 (嗓音)未压低(或未变柔和)的 [无]未调制的
examples: An unmodulated stable laser system, which has been used as a tunable CO_2 laser sideband coherent source, is introduced.
Threshold extension and adaptive noise reduction technology means that noise is 50 dB down for an unmodulated 13.5-dbf stereo signal.
The mobile apparatus comprises a reflector and performs reflection wave transmission by carrying data on a reflection wave for unmodulated carrier.
